personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS / Python / PySpark Data Platform Specialist

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and strong recent focus on AWS data platforms, Python ETL, SQL, PySpark, telemetry pipelines, data quality, and production reporting. Built and operated large-scale data pipelines supporting 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, migrated forecasting workloads to AWS and Redshift, and designed governed data foundations for analytics and AI-enabled workflows. Brings hands-on experience in Spark/PySpark, data modeling, observability, automation, CI/CD concepts, Docker, Airflow, and regulated enterprise data environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints across BMC TrueSight/TSCO, replacing manual capacity reporting with repeatable, governed data workflows.
Built a hybrid AWS and Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift, and Oracle schemas to support analytics, forecasting, executive reporting, and historical retention.
Developed PySpark and Python processing patterns for large-scale telemetry and ML forecasting workloads, improving scalability and reducing reliance on manual batch processes.
Designed optimized schemas, partitioning approaches, and SQL reporting layers for capacity, utilization, and seasonal risk analysis across enterprise banking infrastructure.
Implemented data quality checks, reconciliation logic, monitoring, and operational reporting to improve trust in pipeline outputs used by engineering and leadership teams.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, and analytics teams to translate capacity, performance, and risk questions into reliable data models, dashboards, and automated reporting flows.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting observability and data-driven performance optimization.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Built operational analytics and dashboarding workflows using Dynatrace, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, QLIK, Linux, Oracle, PostgreSQL, and AWS planning inputs.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with no production monitoring regression during cutover.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services client, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise platforms.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting, reducing manual weekly exports and improving consistency of operational data delivery.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules that standardized operational visibility across client environments.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, WebSphere, Oracle, SQL, Linux, HPUX, and SunOS teams to investigate performance issues and improve production reliability.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, JDBC bottlenecks, thread contention, heap pressure, CPU constraints, and garbage collection issues.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts to improve real-time visibility during performance testing cycles.
Documented baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams as release gate inputs.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while supporting transaction volumes at large enterprise scale.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing and Oracle access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing frameworks to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to maintain integrity during phased cutover.

experience.title: Architect / Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for a government mainframe modernization program.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 interfaces aligned with enterprise architecture and reliability standards.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs for telecom billing systems.
Delivered C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL performance improvements that reduced memory usage 75%, improved throughput 20%, and achieved 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained AMDOCS billing, EDI, Enabler, CSM, and EMS modules across invoicing, settlement, reporting, and production support workflows.
Automated WebLogic and WebSphere administration using Korn Shell scripting and operated across HPUX, SunOS, Linux, CVS, and ClearCase environments.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, C++, Java, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Athena, Data Lakes, Data Warehousing, Hive/Hadoop, Apache Spark, PySpark
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT Pipeline Design, Data Modeling, Schema Design, Data Quality, Reconciliation, Batch Processing, Data Governance, Operational Reporting, Performance Tuning
skills.Warehousing & Modeling: Oracle, Oracle RAC, PL/SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Dimensional Modeling, Star Schema, Snowflake Schema, Redshift, Data Warehouse Optimization
skills.AI/ML & Analytics: Capacity Forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, ML Data Pipelines, Telemetry Analysis, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly
skills.DevOps & Orchestration: Airflow, Docker, Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Linux/Unix, Monitoring, Alerting, Incident Response
skills.Observability: Dynatrace AppMon, Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM / Introscope, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics, JMX Monitoring, Dashboards, Alerts, Thresholds
skills.Currently Learning / Adjacent: Databricks, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Snowflake, Terraform, AWS MSK / Apache Kafka, FastAPI, Kubernetes

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok/xAI, FAISS vector embeddings, and sentence-transformers. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, job scoring, tailoring, resume and cover letter generation, quality gates, and application tracking with structured artifacts and reproducible pipeline steps.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to replace manual forecasting cycles and predict capacity bottlenecks six months ahead from enterprise telemetry data.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark patterns for governed data processing, AI-ready analytics, Text-to-SQL exploration, and optimized Parquet-based data access.
